feed.title: Nightbox LLC — News
feed.subtitle: First-in-class chimeric NKG2D-LIF6 gene therapy for solid tumor oncology.

entry.title: Nightbox LLC Initiates Provisional Patent Filing for Chimeric NKG2D-LIF6 Receptor-Effector Construct
entry.summary: Nightbox LLC has initiated provisional patent filing on the NKG2D-LIF6 chimeric receptor-effector construct, a 2,123 bp single-construct AAV9 gene therapy for solid tumor oncology.

entry.title: Nightbox LLC Completes In Silico Validation of NKG2D-LIF6 Chimera
entry.summary: In silico package complete: AlphaFold + Rosetta structural validation passed; PK-PD model predicts approximately 99% TGI ceiling on syngeneic CRC models; 1.4 × 10³ tumor-to-healthy selectivity ratio; freedom-to-operate clean.

entry.title: Nightbox LLC Founded
entry.summary: Nightbox LLC, a Wyoming-incorporated, Los Angeles–operating computational biology and gene therapy company, was founded by Artem Shakin to develop single-construct chimeric receptor-effector gene therapies for solid tumor oncology.
